snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Rebased Pi autonomous-delivery exact-hash final Design Sync ACCEPTED/CLEAR
reviewers.independence: UI Design independently verified exact Development patch 0dadc5626a878e8e7f700ab274b89a98eb9b4d0dec96edf3d5e47107c1e3f115 and returned ACCEPTED/CLEAR without edits: one existing draft bubble, final-only citations and grounding, no extra card/CTA/navigation, typed protocol-incompatibility repair, and unchanged Permission Broker status ownership. Product Planning separately reconciled Owner, acceptance and residual facts without changing the five Development paths.

dimensions.summary: Autonomous repair remains inside the same Home Job and existing provisional bubble; it adds no card, CTA, navigation or modal. The already-published Broker card remains unchanged, while the focused permission modal is recorded only as a planned convergence target.

Vision, PRD, Pi, Prompt, Runtime Policy, Security, API, Job, Architecture, UI, Quality, Playbook and Decision owners agree that one submission owns one Pi Job, repairable rejection returns to Pi, Pi authors Markdown, and Host authority and commit gates remain binding.

Exact Home and Pi selectors prove same-Job terminal/citation repair, safe read revisit, bounded non-progress, parsed drafts and removal of the presentation-only provider turn. Requirement, Exit and phase statuses remain unchanged, and Broker production callers remain open.

Development gets one bounded completion contract: typed body-free feedback, accepted-terminal-only durability, progress limits, safe tool revisits and distinct incompatibility, while Permission Broker, egress, cancellation, conflict and privacy hard boundaries retain precedence.

Existing owners, one superseding Decision, Playbook and trace surfaces absorb the exact repair and authorship contract; no new document, dependency, setting, provider, prototype image, implementation scope or status promotion is introduced.

verification.evidence: The exact five-file Pi autonomous-delivery plus governed candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npx vitest run tests/unit/home-agent-service.test.ts tests/unit/pi-agent-runtime-adapter.test.ts tests/unit/permission-broker-home-agent.test.ts tests/unit/permission-broker-job-recovery.test.ts tests/unit/permissioned-external-capability-service.test.ts
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 and negative fixtures pass; focused Home/Pi and Broker overlap matrices prove same-Job repair, no presentation-only model turn, strict hard-boundary precedence, restart-safe allow-once and denial without effect.

Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,184 claims. Changed Pi, evaluation and Home projections bind exact executable repair while preserving planned production Broker callers and every Requirement, Exit and phase state.

LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass after consolidating autonomous completion, Pi Markdown authorship and capability-versus-authority wording in existing owners, without a new document, dependency, setting, prototype or unrelated feature breadth.

coordination.taskTitle: Pi Agent autonomous completion and delivery
coordination.compatibility: The exact five-file implementation changes Home/Pi completion and draft sourcing only. It preserves the merged Permission Broker onError, allow-once/deny/restart behavior, model egress, data layouts, dependencies, settings and public status states; broader Pi-authored ingest and production arbitrary-path callers remain open.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact 0dadc562 rebased bytes after focused/full, assembled Broker-plus-repair, package and worker evidence. UI Design returned exact-hash ACCEPTED/CLEAR without edits. Product Planning reconciled the prior autonomy governance delta onto the published Broker baseline and changed only affected owners, acceptance, semantic and current recipe surfaces.

nonBlockingRisks: This slice proves Home repair; legacy agent_ingest correction and durable mid-repair Pi transcript/checkpoint adoption remain open.
Progress-aware bounds still require broad live-provider cost, latency and repeated-failure tuning.
Live timing is Responses-compatible loopback; Chat Completions, Anthropic Messages and packaged live-network matrices remain open.
Permission Broker hard boundaries remain authoritative; the production external adapter registry is still empty and the focused permission modal, saved grants and YOLO remain planned.
The final path-based syscall TOCTOU interval and broader cross-process matrices remain platform primitive boundaries.
Signed installed macOS/Windows proof remains open.
